title: FoxWorth Edition (Menu & Resources)
description: Main Menu Mod I made for Minecraft: FoxWorth Edition. Replaces the main menu screen to a purple type theme. The Buttons are also purple. The Title is changed to Minecraft: FoxWorth Edition. It also adds custom splash texts.
body: Main Menu Mod I made for Minecraft: FoxWorth Edition. Replaces the main menu screen to a purple type theme. The Buttons are also purple. The Title is changed to Minecraft: FoxWorth Edition. It also adds custom splash texts.
